content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.47% and Bank Nifty -0.60% with VIX +1.6% to 18.6 signal a risk-off undertone, yet sectoral rotation is sharp — capital goods, defence, metals, and select infra names are gapping up on stock-specific catalysts (Q4 prints, order wins). With a book already 42% deployed and several positions hot from morning gap-ups, priority is locking gains via SL trails rather than chasing extended breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+6.6% unrealized, Q4 beat thesis intact, ICICI Sec TP 1350 upgrade. Trail SL from 1025.86 to 1030 — locks in ~+4.7%, sits ~1.3% below CMP 1048.70 (above the 1% trail-gap floor). R:R from current still 1:2.0+ to 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-2.8% with SL 119 still ~2.2% below CMP 121.65. Gold ETF remains a portfolio hedge given VIX 18.6 and ongoing macro uncertainty. SL is fine; thesis (geopolitical hedge) intact even with recent ceasefire-related softness. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 1500,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 23.75 is ~1% below CMP 24.00 — extremely tight; one normal downtick stops out. Pharma sector mildly red today, MACD signals on the index mixed, +1.5% gain marginal. Better to book +₹525 cleanly than have a self-stopout fire. Capital can rotate to higher-conviction setups."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+2.4% with stock at all-time high 1739.70 on Q4 beat + heavy FII block-deal accumulation (>₹7,400 cr inflow). Trail SL from 1700 (entry) to 1710 — locks in +0.6%, sits ~1.7% below CMP. Above 1% trail-gap floor. Target 1820 reachable; brokerage TPs up to 1900."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-2.5%, but stock recovered today +1.28% intraday on record April sales. SL 13400 is -0.4% below CMP 13485, very tight gap — but tightening further would force a stopout, and loosening is not allowed. Hold at current SL; if it trips at 13400 the loss is contained. April record sales + JM TP 16,570 keep thesis alive."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.3% but bouncing today +3.28% relative strength vs Bank Nifty -0.6%. Q4 PAT +68% YoY, GNPA improving, brokerage upgrades. SL 204 is ~1.1% below CMP 206.28 — adequate gap. Thesis intact post-Q4, hold for target 220."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4585.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.9% on +6.97% defence sector rally, new CMD, Q4 results May 14 (event risk noted but 7 sessions out — outside 3-session binary window). Trail SL from 4575 to 4585 — small breakeven-plus, sits ~1.6% below CMP 4641. Above 1% floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 510.00,
      "new_target": 540.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "+2.2%, but ED/PMLA raid overhang from Apr 24 + Q4 board meeting May 11 (4 sessions out, on edge of 3-session binary window). Trail SL from 506 to 510 — locks in +0.8%, ~1.3% below CMP 516.70. Reduce max hold to 5 days to exit before May 11 board meeting; PMLA overhang dictates not riding into the binary at full size. If stock hits 510 before May 11, take the small gain."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in ~+4.7% on a Q4-beat winner; SL still 1.3% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; SL adequate at -2.2% from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL only 1% below CMP — self-stopout risk; book +₹525 cleanly."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "reasoning": "ATH breakout on FII inflow; lock breakeven-plus."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 13400, can't loosen; recovering today on April sales record."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong relative strength today; Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4585.00,
      "reasoning": "Defence rally +6.97%; nudge SL to breakeven-plus."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 510.00,
      "reasoning": "ED/PMLA overhang + May 11 board meeting; tighten to lock gain ahead of binary."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL, LALPATHLAB, TATATECH, VEDL, HFCL — all gapped up 8-15% on Q4 catalysts; chasing into +10% gap-ups invites mean-reversion pain, especially in a -0.47% Nifty tape with VIX +1.6%. Wait for a higher low / first pullback to assess re-entry. ADANIGREEN — bullish setup but live US SEC fraud case + DOJ indictment overhang fails the regulatory due-diligence bar (rule 13). NO_ACTION. VEDL — promoter pledge encumbrance + dividend policy weakening = governance flag, despite price action. SOBHA, MANAPPURAM, FLUOROCHEM, NAVINFLUOR, MOTILALOFS, LAURUSLABS — keep on radar but not actionable today. NIFTYBEES — index weak, no edge in adding broad-market exposure here.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 42% deployed with 8 holdings; cash ~57% gives flexibility. Today's tape (Nifty -0.47%, VIX 18.6, sharp single-name gaps) is a manage-existing day, not a chase day. Three winners trailed (PNBHOUSING, ADANIPORTS, HAL), one micro-trail (ANANTRAJ) ahead of binary, one EXIT (PHARMABEES) to remove SL-too-tight risk, three HOLDs. No new entries — every actionable watchlist name is either +8% extended (mean-reversion risk into weak tape) or carries unresolved governance/regulatory flags (ADANIGREEN, VEDL, ANANTRAJ already in book at flag). Cluster check: no new admissions. Capital preservation prioritized."
}
